brief.label: JP CAPITAL DESK
brief.body: The Fed is holding at 3.50-3.75% as inflation stays above target. Late-cycle easing has paused; the next cut is leaning toward September with the curve normalizing. DXY soft, giving room to commodities and EM.
brief.keyRisk: A hot NFP or oil-driven inflation surprise could push the first cut later and lift the short end.

fedFunds.subtitle: Market leans first cut ~Sep; drift toward ~3.0% by year-end
